title: digitaria bicornis
intro: Digitaria bicornis, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria bicornis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Digitaria bicornis can be prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the leaves in water, or as a powder by drying and grinding the plant material, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
